hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) command -v eslint >/dev/null 2>&1 && eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1 || (command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>&1) || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix "$f" && ruff format "$f" 2>&1 || true ;; esac

hooks.prompt: Before ending: did this turn change code? If so, confirm the typecheck, build, and the relevant tests were actually RUN with their output shown as evidence (not merely asserted). If any was not run, run it now or state explicitly why it was skipped. Verification is part of done.
